product_updates.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
product_updates.content: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

product_updates.title: Apple reportedly testing four designs for upcoming smart glasses
product_updates.content: These glasses are a step back from an ambitious plan that once called for Apple to launch a variety of mixed and augmented reality devices.

product_updates.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
product_updates.content: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

product_updates.title: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
product_updates.content: Anthropic was the star of the show at San Francisco's AI-centric conference.
